headline: Workday (WDAY) Stock Could Be 31.7% Undervalued as AI Growth Narrative Faces a Market Test
summary: Workday (WDAY) has been under pressure recently, with the stock down 4% over the past day and 10% over the past week, extending a decline of 14% over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Workday. Looking beyond the latest move, Workday’s share price has been under pressure for some time, with the year to date share price return down 43.18% and the 1 year total shareholder return down 50.91%. This points to fading momentum as investors reassess growth and risk. If Workday’s pullback...

headline: Workday (WDAY) Why Embark’s Commit Deal Could Matter For Its Ecosystem
summary: Embark has acquired Commit, a consulting firm focused on the Workday ecosystem. The deal expands Embark’s human capital advisory capabilities for Workday deployments and modernization projects. The transaction increases the pool of third party expertise available to companies using Workday for HR and finance. Workday (NasdaqGS:WDAY) sits at the center of many HR and finance transformation projects, and this acquisition highlights the level of interest external consultants have in the...
